sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_a (id INT, value Nullable(Int32));
CREATE TABLE test_b (ref_id INT, name STRING);
SELECT id FROM test_a WHERE isNotNull(value) AND id = ANY (SELECT ref_id FROM test_b WHERE name = 'A');
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_a WHERE isNotNull(value) GROUP BY id HAVING isNotNull(value) = 1;
SELECT t1.id FROM test_a AS t1 JOIN test_b AS t2 ON t1.id = ANY (SELECT ref_id FROM test_b WHERE name = t2.name) WHERE isNotNull(t1.value);
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_a) AS subquery WHERE isNotNull(value) = 1 AND id = ANY (SELECT ref_id FROM test_b);
CREATE TABLE test_c (date_col Date, nullable_col Nullable(Int32));
SELECT date_col FROM test_c WHERE isNotNull(nullable_col) AND date_col = ANY (SELECT date_col FROM test_c WHERE date_col > toDate('2022-12-31'));
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value FROM test_a;
SELECT * FROM temp_table WHERE id = 2 AND isNotNull(value) = 0;
SELECT id FROM test_a WHERE isNotNull(value) AND value = ANY (SELECT value FROM test_a WHERE id < 3);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_a WHERE isNotNull(value) OR id = ANY (SELECT ref_id FROM test_b WHERE name = ANY (SELECT name FROM test_b WHERE name LIKE 'B%'));
SELECT id FROM test_a WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND id = ANY (SELECT ref_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT name FROM test_b) AS nested_subquery);
